item.title: 🛢️ Iranian Oil Tankers Cluster Near Chabahar as U.S. Blockade Tightens
item.description: At least six Iranian tankers laden with oil are loitering near Chabahar port, caught between the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. naval blockade line. The cluster suggests Iran continues loading oil but the U.S. interception is working to delay exports.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Ex-Mossad Chief Pardo Condemns West Bank Violence as "Existential Threat" to Israel
item.description: Former Mossad director Tamir Pardo said he was "ashamed to be Jewish" over settler violence in the West Bank, comparing it to Holocaust-era tactics. He warned the crackdown risks civil strife and poses an existential threat to Israel.

item.title: 🇦🇺 Australia Invests $1.7B in Second HIMARS Regiment for Long-Range Strike
item.description: Australia will spend AUD2.3 billion to establish a second long-range fires regiment equipped with HIMARS launchers and Precision Strike Missiles, capable of hitting targets up to 500 km away, extendable beyond 1,000 km with future PrSM increments.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Ends Decades-Long Ban on Lethal Weapons Exports to Allies
item.description: Japan has abolished its 1967 ban on lethal weapons exports, opening sales to 17 defense partner countries. The move includes a $6.5B frigate deal with Australia and potential submarine sales to Indonesia, driven by concerns over China and North Korea.

item.title: ⚛️ China Tests Truck-Mounted Nuclear Reactor for AI Data Centers
item.description: Chinese scientists are testing a prototype 10-megawatt vehicle-mounted nuclear reactor that could power medium-sized AI data centers. The "nuclear power bank" offers decades-long operation without recharging and could serve remote regions, ships, and space systems.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Announces Exit from OPEC and OPEC+
item.description: The United Arab Emirates announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ effective May 1, ending nearly 60 years of membership and stripping the cartel of its third-largest producer.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Strikes Russian Tuapse Oil Refinery Again
item.description: A drone attack caused a fire at Russia's Tuapse refinery on the Black Sea coast, with authorities confirming the strike. The refinery has been a repeated target of Ukrainian drone attacks.

item.title: ✈️ Europe Faces Jet Fuel Supply Crunch as Middle East Imports Stop
item.description: Europe's jet fuel imports from the Middle East have stopped due to the Iran conflict, raising concerns about aviation fuel supply as summer travel season approaches.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Confident US Commitment to Indo-Pacific Amid Iran War
item.description: A top Philippine defense official expressed confidence that the US commitment to the Indo-Pacific region remains strong despite the Iran conflict, saying they see no sign of American distraction.

item.title: 🇬🇧 King Charles Addresses US Congress in Rare Speech
item.description: King Charles III delivered a rare address to a joint session of the US Congress, promoting British-American unity amid global tensions. The speech comes as the Iran conflict strains international alliances.

item.title: 🛡️ US Army Launches Sword 26 Exercise to Execute NATO War Plans
item.description: The US Army's Sword 26 exercise in Germany is training soldiers to execute NATO war plans, testing rapid deployment capabilities amid heightened tensions with Russia.

item.title: 🚀 Pentagon Official: US Has No Defense Against Hypersonic Weapons
item.description: A senior Pentagon official acknowledged that the US currently lacks effective defenses against hypersonic weapons, as China and Russia advance their hypersonic missile programs.

item.title: ⚛️ US and Iran Clash at UN as Tehran Gets Nuclear Non-Proliferation Role
item.description: The US and Iran exchanged sharp words at the UN after Tehran was appointed to a nuclear non-proliferation conference leadership role, with Washington calling the decision \"unconscionable.\"

item.title: 🇩🇪 German Chancellor Merz Says Iran Is 'Humiliating' the US
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz criticized Iran's negotiating stance, saying Tehran was \"humiliating\" the US as nuclear talks stalled amid the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇮🇱 Zelensky condemns Israel for buying grain stolen by Russia from Ukraine
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky criticized Israel for purchasing grain stolen by Russia from Ukraine, saying Kyiv is preparing sanctions in response.

item.title: 🇸🇦🇮🇷 Gulf leaders hold emergency summit in Jeddah on Iran conflict
item.description: Gulf Cooperation Council leaders gathered for an emergency consultative summit in Jeddah to discuss regional tensions stemming from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇧🇭🇮🇷 Bahrain sentences five to life for plotting terrorist acts with Iran
item.description: A Bahraini court sentenced five people to life in prison for plotting terrorist acts in cooperation with Iran, amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 📈 Gulf stock markets rise despite lingering geopolitical tensions
item.description: Gulf stock markets posted gains despite ongoing geopolitical tensions from the Iran conflict, with investors betting on regional stability.

item.title: 📊 Markets see through Iran war as investors adapt to permacrisis
item.description: Investors are treating the Iran conflict as part of a broader \"permacrisis\" environment, adapting strategies to navigate persistent geopolitical volatility.

item.title: 🇬🇧 King Charles to address US Congress in rare speech amid Iran war tensions
item.description: King Charles III will deliver a rare address to a joint session of Congress, promoting British-American unity at a time of global uncertainty over the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Reuters investigation reveals Ukrainian teens accused of betraying country
item.description: A Reuters investigation examines the cases of Ukrainian teenagers accused of betraying their country and the difficult questions around how they should be judged.

item.title: 🌡️ El Nino weather pattern threatens global energy markets
item.description: The looming El Nino weather pattern poses additional risks to global energy markets already strained by the Iran conflict and supply disruptions.

item.title: 📰 Media freedom under sustained attack across EU, report finds
item.description: Media freedom is under sustained attack across the European Union, with public trust in news media dropping amid increasing threats to journalists.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Republicans brace for brutal midterms as Trump popularity slips
item.description: Republicans are preparing for difficult midterm elections as Trump's popularity declines and the party faces headwinds from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Establishes Buffer Zone in Southern Lebanon, Displacing Civilians
item.description: Israel has established a buffer zone in southern Lebanon, displacing civilians and effectively creating a security zone along the border amid ongoing ceasefire violations.
